name: Vision AI Scraper — Firecrawl + Claude Structured Extraction to Sheets
description: Scrapes web pages using Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract structured data from the content (products, prices, contacts, etc.), and saves the extracted data to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Vision-based AI agent scraper - with Google Sheets, ScrapingBee, and Gemini

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving extracted data

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for scraping notifications

urls.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to scrape (e.g. 'https://example.com/products,https://example.com/pricing')

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL to save extracted data

sheetName.description: Sheet tab name for extracted data

extractionSchema.default: Extract all structured data: names, prices, descriptions, ratings, links, contact info
extractionSchema.description: What structured data to extract from the pages

steps.name: Compile scraped content from all pages
Run Claude AI for structured extraction
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Save extracted data to Google Sheets in a loop
Build Slack Block Kit scraping report
